text.title: go-error-handling Output Contract
text.summary: Required apperror package shape, middleware order, and golangci-lint config.

section.title: JSON Schema

example.note: %w wrapping, errors.As with status preservation, repository-boundary mapping.
Five violations: mutable global (r8), %v wrap (r2), type assert (r2), driver leak (r3), status demotion (r9).

list.item: AppError has Code, Message, HTTPStatus, Err and implements Error()+Unwrap().
Every wrap uses %w; no %v in error wrapping sites.
Driver-specific errors (pgx.*, sql.*) appear only inside repository/.
Handlers return error; one ErrorMapper middleware translates.
Middleware order is: ...RequestID, Recovery, Logger, ErrorMapper, Auth...
golangci-lint enables errorlint, wrapcheck, errcheck, nilnil.
Constructors only — no exported mutable *AppError package vars.
